title: Regular Expression Extraction
scenario: Write a regular expression pattern to extract all email addresses from a given string. The output should be a list of email addresses in the format ['john.doe@example.com', 'jane.smith@example.com', 'alice.johnson@example.com'].
constraints: Must be a valid Python regular expression pattern
The pattern should match all common email address formats

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the output is a valid Python regular expression pattern.
Check if all email addresses are correctly extracted.
Verify that the pattern matches all common email address formats.
